name: Daycare Center Conversion
description: You are a childcare facility planner designing a state-licensed daycare center for 30 children (ages 2-5) in a leased residential villa shell. Convert the villa located at ~/Documents/SweetHome3D/daycare_center_starter.sh3d into a fully equipped daycare center. Your design must include at least 3 partition walls and at least 4 named rooms (such as 'Nap Room', 'Play Area', 'Kitchen', 'Staff Office', or 'Restroom'). Furnish the facility with at least 14 chairs and 6 tables for activity areas, 6 beds for the nap room, 3 kitchen appliances, 3 toilets and 2 sinks for the restrooms, and a desk with seating for the staff office, ensuring the completed plan contains at least 40 total furniture items. Additionally, draw at least 2 evacuation route polylines marking paths from interior zones toward building exits for fire safety compliance. Save all changes to the file.
expected_output: A saved .sh3d file with partitioned zones, named rooms, age-appropriate furnishings, and evacuation route polylines.
